THE RED MONKEY

About

The Red Monkey is a community pub in Redland, Bristol. We serve a rotating selection of real ales, craft lagers, and ciders in a welcoming, no-fuss atmosphere.

Opening Hours

Day Hours
Monday – Friday 16:00 – 23:00
Saturday 12:00 – 23:00
Sunday 12:00 – 22:00
